title: T's Boring Modpack
description: A kitchen sink modpack made with customizability in mind.
body:
# T's Boring Modpack
This mod pack is specially designed for playing on the We Are The Boredom Minecraft server, with some extra features, tools, and tweaks!\
This pack is made to be highly customizable for all playstyles, from pure looks to high performance, or many redstoning tools, this pack has it all!

Performance: With all features on, 32 chunk render distance and High+ shader settings, I can get 60+ fps on my 3060ti. On lower cards, turn down/off shaders, lower render distance and disable some resource packs to better performance if needed.

*All gallary images use [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound), [rotorBLOCKS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rotrblocks), and [T's Custom Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ts-textures).*\
*[Physics Mod Pro](https://www.patreon.com/posts/physics-mod-pro-117137252?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_fan&utm_content=web_share)  is recommemned.*
